subject: WM-0123 review: changes_requested
body: High: M8FactionEndgameStore re-register paths rewrite active arc/route rows without unlink/relink or terminal-state/accounting guards, resetting explicit state while leaving indexes and metrics stale. High: route faction masks and arc contradiction/negotiation/failure masks accept out-of-domain values, including invalid faction bits and numeric wrap/truncation, violating bounded structured owner facts.
